prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-WBC-LG-BL Product Type: BACKPACK Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Waterproof Backpack Cover Universal Fit Adjustable Draw String Description: Be prepared and protect your investment inside your backpack in any kind of weather.

The durable waterproof polyester backpack cover fits most standard size backpacks and protects the backpack and contents inside from rain and snow. Versatile straps and draw string closure allow for the cover to fit backpacks snugly and securely, even in a torrential downpour. Bright blue cover makes it easy to spot, and also folds for easy storage and transportation.

This Backpack Cover is ideal for taking along hikes, camping, fishing, boating, and everyday use. Whether its your laptop in your backpack or camping supplies, this backpack cover has your back. Search Terms: camping travel outdoors hiking backpacking Features: - Dimensions: 44" x 34" - Color: Blue - Durable Waterproof Polyester Material - Draw String Closure - Covers Standard Sized Backpacks === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters. Please include the size and color of the item in the Product Name, if available. === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Waterproof Backpack Cover Blue Universal Fit

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Universal Fit Blue Waterproof Backpack Cover

anthropic.title_differentiation: Durable Polyester, Draw String Closure, Rain And Snow Protection, Foldable Storage, Standard Sized Backpacks

openai.title_differentiation: Waterproof Polyester, Adjustable Draw String Closure, Fits Standard Backpacks, Rain And Snow Protection, Folds Compactly
